status: C354 in progress — esp32_controller.py CLI tool built and tested; simulation mode validated; awaiting PERSIST phase commit/push
focus: Build ESP32 projection controller translating cortana internal state → LED commands via HTTP REST API
context: Hardware shifted from GPIO-based Raspberry Pi (led_driver.py) to WiFi-connected ESP32-WROOM-32. Created esp32_controller.py CLI that maps phase/confidence→color/animation/brightness. Simulation mode enables testing without network connectivity.
artifacts_produced_this_cycle: esp32_controller.py — CLI tool projecting state→LED commands
error_gap_resolved: Previous led_driver.py designed for direct GPIO control on Raspberry Pi; new esp32_controller.py targets HTTP REST API at 192.168.4.38
key_learnings: Simulation mode is valid development progress when hardware depends on external logistics
HTTP REST interface generalizes better than GPIO for distributed systems
State-driven projection creates ambient presence independent of terminal access
